center.name: 萨摩亚群岛
center.summary: 萨摩亚群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Many-colored fruit dove、Polynesian starling、Samoan starling，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |edition=3rd |location=Pago Pago, American Samoa |archive-url=https://archive.today/20210709073733/https://www.nps.gov/npsa/learn/education/upload/NatHistGuideAS09.pdf |archive-date=2021-07-09 }} It occurs on islands in the south-west Pacific Ocean where it is found in Fiji, the Samoan Islands, and Tonga

birds.evidence: It is found in the Samoan Islands, Fiji, Niue, Tonga, the Santa Cruz Islands and Wallis and Futuna
